name: Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones
description: Premium wireless headphones with active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and studio-quality sound. Featuring Bluetooth 5.0, touch controls, and foldable design for on-the-go use.

name: Smart Fitness Watch Pro
description: Advanced fitness tracker with heart rate monitoring, GPS, sleep tracking, and 7-day battery. Water resistant up to 50m. Compatible with iOS and Android.

name: 4K Ultra HD Webcam
description: Professional 4K webcam with auto-focus, built-in dual microphone, and wide-angle lens. Perfect for video conferencing, streaming, and content creation.

name: Mechanical Gaming Keyboard
description: RGB mechanical keyboard with tactile brown switches, N-key rollover, and detachable wrist rest. Built for gamers and professionals who demand precision.

name: Premium Leather Wallet
description: Genuine full-grain leather bifold wallet with RFID blocking technology. Holds up to 8 cards plus cash. Slim profile, handcrafted with premium stitching.

name: Polarized Aviator Sunglasses
description: Classic aviator sunglasses with 100% UV400 protection and polarized lenses. Lightweight metal frame, scratch-resistant coating, and includes protective case.

name: Minimalist Backpack 25L
description: Sleek 25L backpack made from water-resistant nylon with laptop compartment (up to 15"), hidden pockets, and ergonomic shoulder straps. Perfect for work and travel.

name: Classic White Sneakers
description: Iconic white leather sneakers with cushioned insoles and durable rubber outsoles. Versatile everyday style that complements any outfit, available in all sizes.

name: Merino Wool Crew Neck Sweater
description: Ultra-soft 100% merino wool sweater with natural temperature regulation. Machine washable, anti-pilling treatment, and available in 8 premium colors.

name: Slim Fit Chino Trousers
description: Premium slim-fit chinos crafted from stretch cotton blend for all-day comfort. Versatile for casual and smart-casual occasions. Multiple color options available.

name: Portable Bluetooth Speaker
description: 360° surround sound Bluetooth speaker with 20-hour battery, IPX7 waterproof rating, and built-in power bank. Perfect for outdoor adventures.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated 750ml bottle that keeps drinks cold 24hrs and hot 12hrs. BPA-free, leak-proof lid, and powder-coated finish.
